questions.q: In mid-May 2026, what legal consequence befell a Michigan man who had previously promoted what he hoped would be the 'largest book burning' in American history?
options: He was jailed for contempt of court
He was fined by the EPA for air pollution
He was banned from all state public libraries
He was sued by a coalition of local authors
questions.correctText: He was jailed for contempt of court

questions.q: Which Japanese developer reported a massive 1227% year-on-year operating profit growth in May 2026, driven by the global success of the 'Trails in the Sky 1st Chapter' remake?

Which highly anticipated underwater survival sequel by Unknown Worlds officially entered Early Access for PC and Xbox Series X|S on May 14, 2026?

Which comedian was officially announced in May 2026 to return as the host of the 2027 Academy Awards, marking their third consecutive year in the role?
Which actor, known for playing Dani Rojas in 'Ted Lasso', signed a contract with a professional USL soccer team in May 2026?
